title: Metabase GeoJSON fetch trusts system DNS resolution and reaches link-local addresses
description: url->geojson invokes http/get on an admin-supplied URL using the default DNS resolver. The static valid-host? / valid-url? checks ahead of the fetch refuse obvious link-local literals, but DNS rebinding — a domain whose A record set contains a link-local address — defeats them. The HTTP client then resolves the host to a local-link IP and fetches from it, leaking access to colocated unsecured resources. The fix injects a custom DnsResolver that rejects any host whose resolution includes a link-local address.
